title: rust: fix lichen-core ipv6 manual_is_multiple_of clippy lint
description: Why this exists: while validating project-LICHEN-2eg7, cargo clippy -p lichen-core --all-targets -- -D warnings failed on pre-existing code in rust/lichen-core/src/ipv6.rs:276, where total_len % 8 != 0 triggers clippy::manual_is_multiple_of under the active Rust toolchain. What needs to be done: update the IPv6 extension-header length check to the idiomatic is_multiple_of form or otherwise handle toolchain compatibility, then rerun lichen-core clippy with -D warnings.
close_reason: Completed: replaced the IPv6 extension-header length modulo check with is_multiple_of so lichen-core clippy passes without the previous allow. Tests: cargo test -p lichen-core; cargo clippy -p lichen-core --all-targets -- -D warnings; git diff --check. Review pass 1: found unrelated rustfmt churn in ipv6.rs tests and reverted it. Review pass 2: no findings; final diff is the intended one-line source change plus Beads metadata.
